summary: Comprehensive testing of all iteration 2 features: login-only page, admin panel, user management, guest type/companion fields, seating plan full names, color coding, and export. All 16 backend tests passed. All major UI features working correctly.

issues: Name labels near seats show only last name next to initials (e.g., 'MM Mustermann') - first name not shown beside seat circle. Full name 'Lena Kind' shown only when at top/bottom position. Minor layout observation, not a bug.

critical_code_review_comments: Event list is scoped by user_id (correct) - but should verify non-admin users cannot access other users' events via API (frontend shows per-user correctly)
No rate limiting on login endpoint - could be brute-forced
password minimum length is 4 chars - very low, consider increasing to 8
seed_data_creation: Created 'uitestuser' (non-admin, test1234), 'UI Test Event' with 2 guests (Max Mustermann/Erwachsener, Lena Kind/Kind) via admin account for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 2 features fully implemented and working: login-only page (no registration), garage image on login, admin user management at /admin, Alter/Begleitperson guest fields, seating plan full names with color coding (green=Erwachsener, blue=Kind), export SVG with full names. Backend: /api/auth/register removed (404), /api/admin/users returns 403 for non-admin. Test users in DB: uitestuser (test1234), TEST_testuser_auto, demo2025.

features_verified.admin_button_in_header: PASS - Shield+Admin button visible for admin role
features_verified.create_user: PASS - admin can create users via UI
features_verified.reset_password: PASS - admin can reset user passwords
features_verified.guest_alter_dropdown: PASS - ALTER select with Erwachsener/Kind options
features_verified.guest_begleitperson: PASS - BEGLEITPERSON VON dropdown shows guests
features_verified.guest_type_badges: PASS - green badge for Erwachsener, blue for Kind
features_verified.seating_full_names: PASS - full names displayed radially near seats
features_verified.export_full_names: PASS - SVG and Sitzliste show full names
